column2: Ship the ADR framework and the four locked-fork ADRs (0001-0006) plus docs/conventions/{coding,events,api}.md. Docs only, no code. Cites the approved arch-scaffold epic plan. See parent issue for locked architectural forks.

Ship ADRs 0007-0018 (data, observability, media, versioning, transport, privacy) plus remaining docs/conventions/*.md and docs/privacy.md. Docs only. Depends on part-1 for the ADR template + events/api naming.

Introduce packages/contracts/ with event JSON Schemas (jobs.media.index.v1, events.media.indexed.v1, events.media.index_failed.v1), OpenAPI 3.1 skeleton, canonical schema.sql reference, scripts/gen-contracts.sh, and a CI drift-check job. Adds initial entries to AGENTS.md §6 overlap list.
Ship docs/architecture/overview.md plus 7 Mermaid diagrams (C4 context/container/component × 2, sequence × 2, ER data model). Cross-references ADR numbers. Docs only.

Ship infra/compose/{compose.yml,compose.prod.yml,.env.example}, Postgres init with pgvector, Redis conf, Caddyfile (same-origin), OTel collector config, infra/models/README.md. Only pg + redis + caddy + otel services — API/worker/web arrive in later slices via additive edits.

Ship the Rust workspace + services/api/ with Cargo.toml, src/main.rs binding Axum to /healthz, empty domain/application/adapters/telemetry mod.rs modules, migration harness with an empty 0001_init.sql, and Dockerfile. cargo check clean; curl /healthz works.

Ship services/worker/ with pyproject.toml + uv.lock, src/visloom_worker/__main__.py running an empty Redis consumer loop, domain/ports/*.py ABCs, adapter stubs raising NotImplementedError, ruff.toml, mypy.ini, and a CUDA-base Dockerfile with CPU fallback. python -m visloom_worker --help exits 0.

Ship the root package.json + pnpm-workspace.yaml, apps/web/ scaffold (Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind, shadcn/ui with components.json), and a single placeholder app/page.tsx linking to the API /healthz through Caddy. pnpm --filter web build succeeds.

Ship the top-level Makefile with the documented targets (bootstrap, up, down, dev-*, db-reset, migrate, contracts, lint, fmt, test, check), scripts/bootstrap.sh, scripts/db-reset.sh, and docs/workflow/{development,testing,ci,release}.md. Verifies the full-epic acceptance criteria end-to-end.
